title: First show in 5 Palmas
description: Where it all began — the block, the mic, the truth.
longDescription: Los Aldeanos debut in 5 Palmas. Two voices, one neighborhood, a generation that found its mirror in rap. La Aldea is born.

title: Duo formation
description: Al2 and El B — two brothers in word, one heartbeat.
longDescription: Aldo Roberto Rodríguez Baquero (Al2) and Bian Oscar Rodríguez Galá (El B) become the duo. Metaphor and street, philosophy and flow.

title: Censurados
description: The album that defined a generation.
longDescription: Censurados: social critique, urban poetry, awakened consciousness. A before and after in Cuban rap.

title: Poesía Esposada
description: Love, metaphor, and freedom in every verse.
longDescription: The duo's mature work: protest with tenderness, reflection with fire. Underground raised to literature.

title: El Atropello
longDescription: Messages of freedom and youth that transcend the island. The duo at their most expansive.

title: Duo separation
description: End of an era — the legacy remains.
longDescription: Los Aldeanos close their joint chapter. What they built together lives on in millions of aldeana hearts.

title: After the duo (appendix)
description: Solo paths — a brief note at the margin of the main archive.
longDescription: Al2 and El B continue separately. This museum honors above all 2003–2014, when they were one.
